description: A customer calls to cancel an order, but it has already been shipped.

nodes.task_description: Identify the order and check its status.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the order has already been shipped and provides the tracking number.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that the order cannot be cancelled but they can return it for a refund once it arrives.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the return process.

nodes.task_description: Create an RMA for the customer in advance so they can easily process the return.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent proactively creates the RMA for the customer.
